rows.label: tev036291_MSG0001
rows.name:
Psst! Hey, you! Maybe you can
clue me in on something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036291_MSG0002
rows.name:
I hear there's a person in the
administrative district who teaches
xenoforms how to use FrontierNet?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036291_MSG0003
rows.name:
Well, I was hoping to to brush
up on the ins and outs of the
system myself, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036291_MSG0004
rows.name:
Can you tell me this
instructor person's name?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036291_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell Quiquat to speak with Tobias.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036291_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell Quiquat to speak with Kirsty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036291_MSG0005
rows.name:
So you say this man has been making
lots of money over FrontierNet?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036291_MSG0006
rows.name:
Oh, that's perfect! Perhaps he can
even show me how to track down the
materials I need to repair NLA?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036291_MSG0007
rows.name:
Or help me quickly compile information
about Mira's myriad mysteries?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036291_MSG0008
rows.name:
This is all very exciting, isn't it? I'm
going to to to squeeze every last drop of
information out of this Tobias fellow![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036291_MSG0009
rows.name:
We Ma-non need to get with the
times and become FrontierNet
savvy, wouldn't you agree?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036291_MSG0010
rows.name:
Really? She helps oversee all
of FrontierNet? She must be some
sort of superwoman, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036291_MSG0011
rows.name:
Then perhaps she'll know how
to track down the materials
I need to repair the city?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036291_MSG0012
rows.name:
Or even how I might compile information
about Mira's myriad mysteries?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036291_MSG0013
rows.name:
This is all very exciting, isn't it? I'm
going to to to squeeze every last drop of
information out of this Kirsty person![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036291_MSG0014
rows.name:
We Ma-non need to get with the
times and become FrontierNet
savvy, wouldn't you agree?[ST:wait ]
